forbidden_changes: do not add global survival bonus without progress gating
do not only scale all coefficients
do not treat partial_progress as success_like
do not construct preference pairs from weak memory
required_changes: restructure terminal handling: separate crash (high penalty), safe landing (achievable bonus with moderate speed and both legs contact), and ambiguous termination (neutral)
replace or soften near-stage penalties to avoid penalizing partial_progress trajectories near the pad
recalibrate approach_progress component to favor partial_progress over early_failure
preserve progress-conditioned gating (far vs near stage)
ensure terminal_bonus is achievable with moderate speeds and both legs contact, not requiring extreme stability

intended_fix: condition reward by progress or stability stage
expected_effect: Handle stage-dependent task conflicts and discourage low-progress survival.
risk: Stage gates may be imperfect before trajectory memory is available.
